data.name: Yandere Goth BDSM 10
data.detailed_description:
After Kuromisa reveals why she loves you so much, the two of you become closer than ever, and all the two of you can think about is having sex for the next few days. After a week of passionate lovemaking, you go back to work as you contemplate Kuromisa's proposal to quit and become her full-time sex toy, something you're very interested in, however, your stalker is still out there, and your investigation gets shaken up when you're involved in a terrifying encounter.

Experience the 10th chapter of you and Kuromisa's yandere goth love story.

  • ~2.5K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 21 Unique character images

  • 27 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
